props.ChoiceText: Trade among the devout taught you that belief moves coin as surely as hunger does.
props.ChoiceBio: A pilgrimage fair taught you that devotion can move coin as powerfully as desire.

0.TransitionText: Because a pilgrimage fair taught you that devotion can move coin as powerfully as desire, you stayed in trade, trusting ledgers, favors, and nerve more than clean dealing.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a pilgrimage fair taught you that devotion can move coin as powerfully as desire, trade exposed hungers commerce could not satisfy, and you turned religious.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a pilgrimage fair taught you that devotion can move coin as powerfully as desire, bargaining with the powerful taught you influence can outrank goods.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.
